allow: Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./timesheet.db" npx prisma migrate dev --name add-task)
Bash(DATABASE_URL="file:./timesheet.db" npx prisma migrate dev --name add-processed-email)
Bash(gh release create v1.0.0 --repo Gioixxx/TimeSheet --title 'v1.0.0 — Prima release stabile' --notes ':*)
Bash(sqlite3 prisma/timesheet.db "SELECT id, title, date FROM TimeEntry ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3.exe prisma/timesheet.db "SELECT id, title, date FROM TimeEntry ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 5;")
